responsibility: Supply the built-in AeroNav Flight Guidance Computer — Lateral Guidance Level B workspace whenever no real project is configured, including two baselines, complete cross-phase evidence, twelve seeded findings, review records, deterministic adapter fixtures, and a resettable sandbox overlay.

requiredOperations.reason: Materialize sample snapshots and reset the local overlay.

rules.text: No configured project always yields a usable detailed sample, never an empty shell.
Fixtures contain no proprietary binaries or licensed standard text.
Sample and real workspaces use the same application operations and view components.

acceptanceCases.expectedOutcome: The complete sample opens automatically at baseline 2.4.0 with persistent Sample Data badge and Connect real project action.

acceptanceCases.description: Modify a sample finding and preference, then reset.
acceptanceCases.expectedOutcome: Seeded state and counts are restored without affecting any real configuration.
